title: Kumauri (disambiguation)
content:
'''Kumauri''' may refer to one of the following:

*'''[[Vall Kumauri]]''', a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] living around [[10,000 BBY]]
*'''[[Vall Kumauri's flagship]]''', a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] used by the warlord
*The '''''[[Kumauri Battleship]]''''', a [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]] line designed, built, and used by Vall Kumauri
*The '''[[Kumauri Empire]]''', a polity created by Vall Kumauri
**The [[Galactic Republic–Kumauri Empire war|'''conflict''']] between the Kumauri Empire and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
**A '''[[battle between the Kumauri Empire and the Republic]]''' that was eventually depicted in a fresco in a [[Kumauri palace|palace]] built by the Kumauri Empire
**A [[Kumauri palace|'''palace''']] built by the Kumauri Empire on an [[Unidentified Outer Rim moon|Outer Rim Territories moon]]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Kumauri
}}
